name: Dips Info (8 of 9)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the potato in a strainer and run under cold water to remove the starch. Shake well.
2. Place the potato in a food processor or blender and chop fine.
3. Add the beaten egg, salt, pepper, onion, and vegetable oil to the processed potato. Blend until smooth.
4. Heat the vegetable oil in a 10-inch skillet until it crackles.
5. Drop tablespoon portions of batter into the hot oil and fry until golden brown on each side (about 5 minutes).
6. Drain the fried pancakes on paper towels.
7. Store in a freezer-safe container, ensuring they do not overlap, with a double layer of wax paper between each layer.
8. Reheat on a cookie sheet at 350 degrees F until hot and crisp.
Makes about 50 pancakes or enough for approximately 2 cups of dip.
